title: Goten CLI Configuration
description: Configuration file for the goten CLI tool. Drives `goten init`, `goten migrate up/down/status/generate`, and .env loading.

env_file.description: Path to a .env file loaded before YAML interpolation. Cannot itself use ${VAR} (env not yet loaded when this field is read). Missing file is a fatal error.

database.description: Database connection used by goten migrate commands.

url.description: Database DSN. Supports ${VAR} interpolation against the process environment (and any values loaded from env_file).

driver.description: Database driver. Only postgres is supported in v0.1.

core_dir.description: Directory holding core migration SQL files. `goten init` writes here; `goten migrate up/down/status` reads from here.

plugins.description: Enabled plugins. Each entry is either a shorthand name (e.g. "username" → ./plugins/username/migrations) or an explicit path to that plugin's migrations directory.

table.description: Tracking table name for applied migrations.

generate_dir.description: Where `goten migrate generate <name>` writes new migration template files. Defaults to migrations.core_dir.
